Interface IToolTipItemCollection

Represents a collection of items that define the content regions of a rich tooltip.

This interface is implemented by the PhiRobotics UI library and is not intended to be implemented by consumer code.

Inherited Members
IEnumerable.GetEnumerator()
Namespace: PhiRobotics.UI.ToolTips
Assembly: PhiRobotics.UI.dll
Syntax
public interface IToolTipItemCollection : IEnumerable
Remarks

The Items property provides access to this collection.

Each item in the collection represents a visual region (such as title, content, or separator) within the tooltip.

Items are displayed vertically in the tooltip, in the same order in which they are added to the collection.

Properties

Count

Gets the number of items in the collection.

Declaration
int Count { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
int

The total number of items contained in the collection.

this[int]

Gets the item at the specified index.

Declaration
IBaseRichToolTipItem this[int index] { get; }
Parameters
Type Name Description
int index

The zero-based index of the item.
Property Value
Type Description
IBaseRichToolTipItem

An IBaseRichToolTipItem at the specified index.
Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentOutOfRangeException

Thrown when index is less than 0 or greater than or equal to Count.

RichToolTip

Gets the rich tooltip that owns this collection.

Declaration
IRichToolTip RichToolTip { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
IRichToolTip

The IRichToolTip instance that contains this collection.

Methods

Add(string)

Creates a new text item with the specified text and adds it to the collection.

Declaration
IRichToolTipItem Add(string text)
Parameters
Type Name Description
string text

The text to assign to the item's Text property.
Returns
Type Description
IRichToolTipItem

The created IRichToolTipItem instance.
Remarks

This method is typically used to add descriptive content to the tooltip body.

AddSeparator()

Creates a new separator item and adds it to the collection.

Declaration
IRichToolTipSeparatorItem AddSeparator()
Returns
Type Description
IRichToolTipSeparatorItem

The created IRichToolTipSeparatorItem instance.
Remarks

A separator visually divides content into logical sections.

AddTitle(string)

Creates a new title item with the specified text and adds it to the collection.

Declaration
IRichToolTipTitleItem AddTitle(string text)
Parameters
Type Name Description
string text

The title text.
Returns
Type Description
IRichToolTipTitleItem

The created IRichToolTipTitleItem instance.
Remarks

Title items are typically displayed with emphasized styling and are used as headers or section titles.

Clear()

Removes all items from the collection.

Declaration
void Clear()

Contains(IBaseRichToolTipItem)

Determines whether the specified item exists in the collection.

Declaration
bool Contains(IBaseRichToolTipItem item)
Parameters
Type Name Description
IBaseRichToolTipItem item

The IBaseRichToolTipItem to locate.
Returns
Type Description
bool

true if the item exists in the collection; otherwise, false.
Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentNullException

Thrown when item is null.

RemoveAt(int)

Removes the item at the specified index.

Declaration
void RemoveAt(int index)
Parameters
Type Name Description
int index

The zero-based index of the item to remove.
Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentOutOfRangeException

Thrown when index is less than 0 or greater than or equal to Count.
